---
title: "Quote Bank"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false

import sys
from pathlib import Path

def _find_root(start):
    for p in [start] + list(start.parents):
        if (p / "_quarto.yml").exists():
            return p
    return start

_root = _find_root(Path.cwd())
sys.path.insert(0, str(_root / "shared"))

from viz_helpers import load_study_data

participants_df, quotes_df = load_study_data(_root / "studies" / "pretour-research-2026")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

if len(quotes_df) == 0:
    print("> ⚠️ **TODO: chưa extract quotes vào `data/quotes.csv`.** Table bên dưới sẽ rỗng cho đến khi quotes được fill.\n")
else:
    print(f"Total quotes: **{len(quotes_df)}** · Participants có quote: **{quotes_df['pid'].nunique()}**\n")
```

TODO: render searchable table từ `quotes_df` bằng `itables`, hỗ trợ filter theo `pattern_id` (P1–P6, H1, S1, S2), `confidence_level` (cao / trung_binh / som / hypothesis), và `pid`. Hide các cột PII-adjacent nếu cần.

```{python}
#| echo: false

if len(quotes_df) > 0:
    # TODO: from itables import show; show(quotes_df, ...)
    pass
```
